yesterdayAnalysis: Full rest day as planned before Sunday's race. This was critical preparation for SDIT, allowing complete recovery after the brick workout on 6/23 and the ROUVY sessions earlier in the week. The 9.9h sleep (score 82) on Friday night shows excellent pre-race recovery response.
